title: Falta election results 2026 LIVE: BJP’s Debangshu Panda sweeps Falta by margin of over 1 lakh votes
description: Falta election results LIVE: BJP's Debangshu Panda won Falta seat against CPI(M) rival Sambhu Nath Kurmi. Congress retained third spot, while TMC was down at the fourth spot. TMC's Jahangir Khan had announced that he would not contest the repoll and described it as a personal decision.
